title: Vortex
description: Server-side modpack analytics developed by Atmospace. Tracks player usage of modded blocks, items, crafting, and entities. View in-game summaries and get CSV reports on shutdown to optimize your modpack based on actual player engagement.
body:
# Vortex: Mod Usage Analyzer for NeoForge Servers ![Vortex Banner Transparent Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4bb5adaaee492ca88690d1f9dd934d4aaa2dd21_0.webp) Vortex is a lightweight, server-side NeoForge mod designed to give server administrators clear insights into how their modpack is actually being used by players. ## What it Does: * **Tracks Modded Content Usage:** Vortex silently monitors player interactions with content from other mods, including: * Right-clicking on modded blocks. * Right-clicking with modded items. * Crafting recipes that output modded items. * Dealing damage to modded entities. * **Filters Out Vanilla:** It intelligently ignores all interactions with vanilla Minecraft content, focusing solely on the mods you've added. * **In-Game Summaries:** Administrators can use a simple command (`/vortex` or `/vx`) to get an immediate summary of the most and least used mods across all tracked categories directly in the game chat. * **Dataview web-panel:** A simple web-panel that allows admins to view the data Vortex has collected on their server in an easy to read and sortable manner. ![Dataview Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e930bb8e8b0a914f8399119c76faafb92cb74a81_0.webp) * **Detailed CSV Export:** When your server shuts down, Vortex automatically generates a detailed CSV file (e.g., `vortex_mod_usage_data_MM-DD-YYYY.HH-mm.csv`) in your server's `config/vortex/` folder. This file provides raw, organized data for deeper analysis in spreadsheet software or data visualization tools. ## Why Your Server Needs Vortex: * **Optimize Your Modpack:** Make data-driven decisions to streamline your modpack. Identify mods that are rarely used and consider removing them to reduce server load, client lag, and overall file size. * **Enhance Player Experience:** Discover which mods your community loves and uses the most, helping you focus on content that truly engages your players. * **Informed Decisions:** Move beyond guesswork or player polls. Vortex provides concrete usage statistics to refine your server's modded experience. **Vortex** is an essential tool for any NeoForge server administrator looking to maintain a lean, efficient, and player-centric modpack. >**NOTICE!**
> This mod is still in development.
> Features may be added, removed, or modified during the development process. >
**Atmospace is not responsible for any issues the mod might cause while it is within the beta development cycle**, but will try to assist with issues when possible.
